title: Fact or Myth: The sun is a perfect sphere. Myth – While the sun appea...
description: Fact or Myth: The sun is a perfect sphere. Myth – While the sun appears almost perfectly round, it's slightly flattened at the poles due to its rotation. This gives it an oblate shape, though the difference is very minimal.
